article_title: Bylaw 14797 — Business Improvement Area (Burnaby North Road) Bylaw 2026

minutes_briefs.title: Burnaby North Road Business Improvement Area (BIA) created — new levy for local businesses
minutes_briefs.summary: The City of Burnaby has passed Bylaw 14797, which creates a new Business Improvement Area (BIA) along North Road. A BIA is a defined area where local businesses pay an extra property levy (a special tax) to fund marketing, beautification, and events that benefit the whole neighbourhood. If your business is located within the new Burnaby North Road BIA boundaries, you will now be required to pay this annual levy on top of your regular property taxes.
minutes_briefs.action_required: Check if your property is within the new Burnaby North Road BIA boundaries and budget for the new annual levy.

key_dates.label: Burnaby North Road BIA levy takes effect

minutes_briefs.source_body: Burnaby Bylaw 14797: Business Improvement Area (Burnaby North Road) Bylaw 2026
